title: Add --all,-a flag to podman images
body:
podman images will not show intermediate images by default.
To view all images, including intermediate images created during
a build, use the --all flag.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body:
`
  Expected
      <int>: 4
  to be <
      <int>: 4
`

This is a truly spectacular failure. Well done, CI.

@umohnani8 On closer inspection, looks like this might be an actual issue, CI is expecting more than 4 images and just getting 4. The message is just so poorly formatted you assume that it can't tell 4 is equal to 4.

@mheon this is funny. The output should be 3 lines (1 header and 2 images), that is why I was testing for less than 4.
I think I found a better way of checking the lines returned in the output, let's see.
